name: Bratislava (Slovakia)

colors.symbolism: the upper stripe; the silver (argent) of the city's arms
the lower stripe and the city's heraldic colour

description: Two equal horizontal stripes, an upper white and a lower red, capped with a swallowtail cut into the fly.
history: Bratislava is the capital and largest city of Slovakia. The white-over-red flag takes its colours from the city's arms — a silver three-towered fortification on a red field — a design dating to the medieval period. The arms are a separate municipal symbol and do not appear on the flag.
